title: Dungeons Transfer
description: This modpack brings Minecraft Dungeons to Minecraft
body:
## Description of the modpack
- **Minecraft Dungeons will no longer receive updates, as a memory of this game, I decided to create this modpack**
- **The modpack is based on the Dungeons content mod - [https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-content](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-content)**

# IMPORTANT!

**If you have Dungeons transfer 1.21.1 installed, and you have problems with MidnightLib, you just have to install an older version. I don't know why this happens, but older version works. 
In 1.4 there's an older version already, so just don't update it**

## Note
![resource pack order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50e8971539babea9876b28182f387afea11b1bb6.png)
## plans for a modpack
~~**in the future I plan to transfer Minecraft Dungeons skins to Minecraft and make it a separate file**~~ (I don't think I'll make it)

- **[**Controlify Dungeons**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/controlify-dungeons)** _<-- Curseforge_
